title: Quick & Easy Yoghurt Flatbreads
summary: These flatbreads come together so quickly and are far superior to anything you’ll ever buy in the supermarkets. They’re going to become one of your staple recipes.

ingredients.label: 250g Self-Raising Flour, plus extra for dusting
ingredients.name: Self Raising Flour

method.description: Combine the flour, baking powder and salt in a large bowl. Mix well.
Stir through the yoghurt until a dough forms, then knead together until thoroughly incorporated. Divide the dough into four balls, cover and let rest for 10 mins.

Heat a dry frying pan over medium heat. Dust a work surface with a little flour and roll each ball of dough out until thin, around 2mm. Once the pan is hot, add a flatbread and cook on both sides until golden, for a total of 2-3 mins. Continue until all the flatbreads are cooked.

chefs.name: Chloe René
chefs.summary: Chloe (@chlo_eat) takes inspiration from her diverse upbringing to create recipes and dishes influenced from cultures around the world. Despite her classical training, Chloe's philosophy in the kitchen revolves around simplicity and home-cooking. She firmly believes that the essence of a great meal lies in the quality of ingredients and the care put into their preparation. Instead of relying on complex and technical processes, Chloe prizes the art of letting ingredients shine through, enhancing their natural flavours with a delicate touch.
